reason: The current meta description is generic and doesn't include key search terms like 'lip blushing' or 'powder brows' that prospective clients would search for.
The FAQ states free shipping over $100, but the site-wide announcement banner on every page says 'Free Shipping Over $80' — this inconsistency needs Crystal to confirm the correct threshold.
Adding a call-to-action and the suburb name to the meta description to improve click-through from search results for local queries.
